name: Apple Jelly Spread # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the apple and lemon juices, along with the whole cloves, in a heavy saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat. Reduce heat to low and simmer gently for 10 minutes.
3. In a small bowl, soak the gelatin in cold water until softened.
4. Remove from heat and discard the cloves. Add the gelatin and sugar substitute to the saucepan, stirring well to dissolve.
5. Stir in about three drops of red food coloring if desired; mix well.
6. Carefully pour into two small jars. Cover lightly with lids until cooled.
7. Once cooled, cover tightly and store in the refrigerator for no more than two weeks.
Yield: 2 cups
Serving size: 1 tablespoon
Nutritional information per serving:
Carbohydrates: ~2g
Protein: 0g
Fat: 0g
Calories: 10
Fiber: 0g
Sodium: 1mg
Cholesterol: 0mg
Exchanges per serving: Up to 2 tablespoons may be considered "free."
NOTE: Low-sodium diets: This recipe is excellent.
